review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify the implementation changes are limited to creating 'tasks/v0.7-m5-c-review-automation-roadmap.md'.
Verify the markdown file explicitly defines the boundaries, gating conditions, and verification methods for automated reviews, and establishes how to prevent 'rubber-stamp' scripts.
Verify NO actual CI/CD or local automation scripts were implemented.
Verify NO modifications to existing MCP tools occurred.
Verify NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models occurred.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
